title: Roasted Oozy Chili Quesadilla
description: A spicy and gooey monsoon Mexican (sonoran) dish featuring a blend of spices including ginger paste, with all ingredients plant-based-friendly.
instructions: Slice Spicy Chorizo into thin strips.
In a pan, heat olive oil over medium heat. Add Ginger Paste and salted vegan mozzarella cheese, stirring for about 3 minutes until cheese is melted and mixed with the spices.
On a clean surface, place two flour tortillas. Spoon half of the chorizo mixture onto each tortilla, leaving an edge for folding.
Fold tortillas in half and place seam side down on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Drizzle vegetable oil over both sides of the quesadillas to prevent sticking. Bake in preheated oven for 5 minutes or until cheese is bubbly and golden brown, then flip and bake another 3 minutes.
Remove from oven and let cool slightly before slicing into wedges.
Garnish with chopped cilantro before serving.
